macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin Trades at $68,014 Amid Extreme Retail Fear and Institutional Accumulation
items.summary: Bitcoin is consolidating around $68,014 with a Fear & Greed Index of 9 indicating retail panic, while spot Bitcoin ETFs saw $88M net inflows on February 20 led by BlackRock and Fidelity. A Supreme Court tariff ruling is viewed as a macro tailwind.

items.title: Bitcoin Drops Below $68,000 USDT on Binance
items.summary: Bitcoin fell below 68,000 USDT, trading at 67,990.5 USDT with a 0.32% 24-hour increase as of February 22, 07:01 AM UTC.

items.title: Bitcoin Hovers Near $68,000 with Bearish Technical Signals
items.summary: Bitcoin lingers near $68,000 facing bearish pennants targeting $60,000 support and oversold RSI, though AI forecasts average $76,667 by late February.

items.title: Bloomberg Analyst Predicts Bitcoin Crash to $10K in 2026
items.summary: A Bloomberg analyst forecasts Bitcoin potentially crashing to $10,000 in 2026, prompting debate on the feasibility amid current market dynamics.

items.title: Bitcoin's 2-Year Pattern Shows 12 Green Months Out of 24
items.summary: Crypto analyst Timothy Peterson highlights Bitcoin's pattern of positive returns in half of the last 24 months, predicting a nearly 90% chance of continuation.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Samsung Expands Galaxy AI with Multi-Agent Ecosystem
items.summary: Samsung announced on February 22, 2026, the expansion of Galaxy AI to support multiple integrated AI agents, enhancing user choice and flexibility across the Galaxy ecosystem for more natural everyday interactions.

items.title: CES 2026 Highlights Industrial AI and Physical Robotics Advances
items.summary: CES 2026 showcased breakthroughs in physical AI and robotics, including Siemens' Digital Twin Composer for industrial metaverse, NVIDIA partnership for industrial AI OS, and innovations from AMD, Lenovo, and others driving intelligent transformation.

items.title: AI Brain Installed on Lunar Rover for Edge Computing
items.summary: Astrolab integrated Hewlett Packard Enterprise's Spaceborne Computer with real-time AI and edge computing on its FLIP rover, set to land at the Moon's South Pole in summer 2026, enabling autonomous data processing without Earth dependency.

items.title: Global AI Impact Summit Addresses Gender Bias and Inclusion
items.summary: At the AI Impact Summit, experts highlighted gender imbalances in AI development, with computing professor Hall warning of male-dominated biases in products, while UN Secretary-General Guterres called for women to lead AI innovation to counter discrimination.

items.title: Global Summit Declares Call for Secure and Trustworthy AI
items.summary: Dozens of nations, including the US and China, issued a declaration at a global summit for 'secure, trustworthy and robust' AI, emphasizing the need for facts over hype in international governance.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Xbox Leadership Shake-Up: Phil Spencer Retires, Sarah Bond Exits, Asha Sharma Named Microsoft Gaming CEO
items.summary: In a major shake-up at Microsoft Gaming, Xbox head Phil Spencer has retired, Sarah Bond has exited, and AI executive Asha Sharma has taken over as CEO. This dramatic power shift marks significant changes in Xbox leadership.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Toyota Expands Apple Wallet Car Keys to More Models
items.summary: Toyota has broadened support for Apple Wallet Car Keys, enabling digital key functionality in additional vehicle models for easier access and sharing.

items.title: RTX 5060 Ti 8GB Remains at MSRP Amid RTX 50-Series Hype
items.summary: The RTX 5060 Ti 8GB holds steady at its recommended price as attention narrows to this single option in the RTX 50-series lineup.

items.title: Apple Sets March 4 'Special Apple Experience' Event with iOS 26.4 Beta
items.summary: Apple announces a March 4 event called 'special Apple Experience' coinciding with the release of iOS 26.4 beta, alongside iPhone 18 Pro rumors.

items.title: Tesla Rolls Out CarPlay Highlighting iOS 26 Delays
items.summary: Tesla's CarPlay implementation underscores delays in iOS 26 rollout, as part of recent Apple ecosystem updates.
